problems.title: Unix (hard): Top 5 IP addresses by hits
problems.instructions:
You are given web server access log lines on stdin. Each line starts with an IP address, followed by other fields.

Example:

```text
10.0.0.1 - - [time] "GET /index.html" 200 123
10.0.0.2 - - [time] "GET /about" 200 456
10.0.0.1 - - [time] "GET /contact" 404 78
```

**Task**: Print the **top 5 IP addresses by request count**, along with their counts, sorted from most to least requests.

Format each line as:

```text
COUNT IP
```

Example (for the sample above):

```text
2 10.0.0.1
1 10.0.0.2
```

{hints: Combine `awk '{print $1}'`, `sort`, `uniq -c`, then sort again by the numeric count (`sort -nr`). Use `head -n 5` to limit to 5.}
problems.starterCode: # Compute top 5 IPs by request count from access-log style lines on stdin

problems.title: Unix (hard): Count failed SSH attempts
problems.instructions:
You receive `/var/log/auth.log` style lines via stdin. Lines that indicate a failed SSH login typically contain the phrase `Failed password`.

Example snippet:

```text
Jul  1 00:01:02 host sshd[123]: Failed password for invalid user root from 10.0.0.3 port 54321 ssh2
Jul  1 00:01:05 host sshd[123]: Accepted password for alice from 10.0.0.4 port 54322 ssh2
```

**Task**: Print the number of **failed SSH login attempts** (lines containing `Failed password`) as a single integer.

{hints: Use `grep 'Failed password'` and then `wc -l`. As with earlier exercises, consider trimming output to just the numeric field.}
problems.starterCode: # Count lines containing 'Failed password' from stdin

problems.title: Unix (hard): Files modified within the last day
problems.instructions:
Write a command that lists all regular files under the current directory that were modified within the last 24 hours.

Print one path per line.

**Note**: The exact timestamps will depend on the environment; this problem focuses on the correct `find` flags.

{hints: Use `find . -type f -mtime -1`. You do not need to sort the results.}
problems.starterCode: # Find files modified within the last 24 hours
